description_long: This is a large, lifelike representation of an African elephant, characterized by its massive body, thick legs, and prominent, curved ivory tusks. The animal's skin is textured and wrinkled, with a dark gray coloration that covers its entire body, including its large, fan-shaped ears. The trunk is long and flexible, extending downward and slightly curled at the tip, while the tail is short and tapers to a small tuft. The head is broad, with deep-set eyes and pronounced temporal ridges above the tusks. The overall form is robust and muscular, capturing the imposing presence of this iconic wildlife species.
description: A large, dark gray African elephant with prominent tusks, wrinkled skin, and a long trunk. The body is robust and lifelike, with detailed ears and a short tail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad head, large ears, long trunk, and both tusks prominently.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full body profile, four legs, and the curvature of the tusks and trunk.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back, short tail, and the width of the hindquarters.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite body profile, tusks, trunk, and legs in motion.
